title: Crowd Control
description: The Ultimate Interactive Chaotic Experience for Streamers on Twitch, YouTube, TikTok and beyond
body:
<center>

[![Crowd Control banner](https://i.qixils.dev/cc-banner.png?)](https://crowdcontrol.live)

## [Crowd Control](https://crowdcontrol.live) is the ultimate interactive experience for streamers.

</center>

With nearly 100 unique effects, this mod enables your live audience to take control of your Minecraft world by spawning creepers, freezing you in place, forcing you to bucket clutch, clearing your inventory, randomizing your language, and so much more. Backed by the [overlay extension on Twitch](https://dashboard.twitch.tv/extensions/7nydnrue11053qmjc6g0fd6einj75p) and the external extension anywhere you can share a link, viewers can easily purchase effects with bits, [channel points](https://crowdcontrol.live/how-to-set-up-crowd-control-effects-as-channel-point-rewards/), [TikTok LIVE Gifts](https://crowdcontrol.live/guides/tiktok/), PayPal, Stripe, and [Tiltify](https://crowdcontrol.live/guides/tiltify/) using the dead-simple user interface.

While the mod can be used standalone, we recommend downloading and installing the [Crowd Control desktop application](https://crowdcontrol.live) for access to features like customized prices, TikTok support, and one-click mod setup.

To learn how to use the mod, we've written a [detailed setup guide](https://mccc.qixils.dev/setup) for every version of every mod loader. Paper, Fabric, and NeoForge are all supported for new versions, with some legacy support available for Sponge/Forge as well.

Still not convinced? Just check out the trailer below to see what Crowd Control (and your viewers) can do for you.

<center><iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube.com/embed/JM4tIwZf8sY" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe></center>
